arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain may look to strengthen their left-back options behind Nuno Mendes, with sporting advisor Luís Campos possibly eyeing Belgium for a solution. arts.ttl: PSG Set to Sign Napoli Megastar on Favorable Terms
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could reportedly complete a long-awaited deal for wantaway Napoli forward Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on favorable terms.
